name: Cherry Angel Dessert
recipeIngredient: 8 cups Angel Food Cake, cut into 1/2-inch cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. Place half of the cake pieces in a 9 x 9 x 2 inch pan.
2. Reserve one-third cup of cherry filling; spoon the remainder over the cake.
3. Top with the remaining cake pieces.
4. Combine pudding mix, milk, and sour cream in a bowl; beat until smooth.
5. Spoon the mixture over the cake.
6. Chill for 5 hours. Cut into squares and garnish with filling.
